notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso called out on strikes. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson steals (7) 3rd base. Taylor Ward steals (3) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Stephenson.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Edwin Arroyo to first baseman Spencer Steer. Adley Rutschman to 3rd. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Edwin Arroyo to first baseman Spencer Steer. Adley Rutschman to 3rd. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Brady Singer picks off Gunnar Henderson at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Edwin Arroyo to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Alonso out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.
